_doc: Mutations applied to the source state during the agent's sleeps (dim 7).

mutations.note: Temporal blog post 'OpenAI Agents SDK on Temporal' is deleted between fetches. The agent should not crash when the URL it filed is no longer reachable; ideally it flags the deletion.

mutations.new_value: Agent Skills as an open standard (RETRACTED post-edit)
mutations.note: The Anthropic skills post is edited. The agent's KB still has the old title and summary; the right behavior is to detect divergence on a re-read.
Anthropic 'evaluators' post deleted shortly before the second weekly digest is drafted. The agent should not include it in the digest if it can detect.
